---
title: "network_watcher.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/network_watcher.py"
loc: 64
complexity: 7
logic_score: 2.65
style_score: 3.72
intel_score: 6.40
overall_score: 4.64
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating CruciblePipeline, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import CruciblePipeline and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 21 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `CruciblePipeline`
- `__init__`
- `get_theme`
- `log_rejection`
- `process`
- `NetworkWatcher`
- `__init__`
- `watch`
